name: Yurei Hunt
short_description: Yurei Hunt is a multiplayer hide & seek prop hunt game where deception is key. Play as a Yurei, possessing objects & using abilities, or as a Hunter, relying on instincts & proximity voice chat to track them. With a world full of tricks, surprises & eerie tension, every match is a battle of wits.
detailed_description:
Yurei Hunt – A Supernatural Prop Hunt Like No Other

Yurei Hunt is a multiplayer prop hunt game set in a world of haunted, mystical locations. Play as a Yurei, a ghost that can possess almost any object to hide, trick, and escape, or as a Hunter, searching for spirits disguised in plain sight. Each map is filled with interactive elements that both sides can use to outsmart each other, making every round a thrilling mix of strategy, deception, and quick thinking.

Proximity Voice Chat

Immerse yourself in the haunting atmosphere of Yurei Hunt with real-time proximity voice chat!

  • Communicate with your teammates and strategize, but beware—your voice travels just like in real life.

  • The closer you are to someone, the clearer they hear you. As you move away, your voice fades into the eerie silence.

  • Ghosts can whisper... or taunt! Hunters and ghosts alike can use voice chat, making every round an intense mind game.

  • Feel the tension rise as you hear distant whispers in the dark—was that your teammate... or something else?

Stay silent, stay hidden... or risk being heard!

Immersive Environments & Evolving Gameplay

Explore diverse maps inspired by eerie traditional Japanese locations and futuristic cyberpunk cityscapes. From cursed shrines cloaked in mist to neon-lit streets pulsing with energy, every setting offers unique ways to outmaneuver your opponents.

Key Features

🌏 Diverse Maps – Haunted shrines, dense forests, cyberpunk streets, and more, each designed for mind games and strategy.

🌀 Tactical Abilities & Deception – As a Yurei you can turn into almost any object in the map and you can manipulate your surroundings, creating illusions and using darkness to evade capture.

🎮 Multiplayer – Play with up to 8 players, competing with friends or online opponents.

  • Dynamic Weather: Thick fog, sudden snow, or lightning strikes can change visibility and create new strategies for both Yurei and Hunters.

  • Dynamic World Elements: Each map features unique interactive elements that shape the game. Turn off streetlights with switches to cloak Yurei in darkness, or extinguish lanterns in shrines for a stealthy escape. From flickering neon signs to creaky doors, every environment offers new ways to hide, hunt, and manipulate the shadows.

⚡ Advanced Graphics & Performance – Powered by Unreal Engine’s latest technology, with Nvidia DLSS ensuring smooth, high-performance gameplay.

Will you become the hunter or the hunted?
